2026.methodology: 2026 forecast uses the audited Al-Nassr extension figures ($224M salary base) plus projected 20% CAGR for digital revenue streams. Spending accounts for capital calls in the Pestana CR7 expansion and operating costs of the UR•MARV studio (valued at £450M in 2026). Total net worth consolidation estimated at $1.2B - $1.4B.

business_ventures.name: CR7 Brand Income and Digital Platforms

business_expansion.name: Global Hotel Chain and Wellness Clinics Expansion

luxury_assets.name: Real Estate Acquisitions and Aviation Maintenance

2025.methodology: Figures derived from Forbes 2025 World's Highest-Paid Athletes and Bloomberg Billionaires Index. Income includes $225,000,000 from on-field activities and $60,000,000 from off-field endorsements. Spending reflects documented capital expenditures for the Pestana CR7 hotel brand and estimated lifestyle costs for a high-net-worth individual with a $1.4B valuation.

real_estate.name: Property Development and Luxury Real Estate

lifestyle_and_ops.name: Private Aviation, Luxury Assets and Staff Salaries

2024.methodology: Data based on Forbes' 2024 Highest-Paid Soccer Players report. Income represents gross earnings before taxes and agent fees. Spending is estimated based on known investment portfolios (Pestana CR7, Chrono24), reported property acquisitions in Riyadh and Lisbon, and operational costs for his global brand maintenance.
